🚨 Over 15 MILLION Americans are now on GLP-1 drugs. 🚨

With stats that massive, your standard clinical routines have to change. If your patient is taking a GLP-1 like Ozempic or Wegovy, the traditional 8-hour NPO rule is officially not enough to protect them before surgery.

What are Weingarten Rights… and why should nurses know them?

You have the right to representation during certain workplace situations, and a lot of nurses don’t even realize it.

Knowing your rights isn’t optional. It’s how you protect your license, your job, and yourself.

NDRIs: different from SSRIs & SNRIs 💊🧠

NDRI = Norepinephrine + Dopamine Reuptake Inhibitor
(Think bupropion.)

Remember:
✔️ Used for depression & smoking cessation
✔️ NO sexual dysfunction (common test point 👀)
✔️ Can increase risk of seizures
✔️ Avoid in patients with eating
